subcodes.first_line: The heavens have proclaimed: "The Lord of Names hath come!" And the Dove hath warbled: "The Lord hath appeared through His Most Glorious Name!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطقت السماء قد اتی مالک الاسماء و غنت الورقاء قد ظهر الرب باسمه الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
